verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of the sons of Korah. Clap your hands, all you peoples; Shout to God with a voice of joy.
verses.2: For the LORD Most High is to be feared, A great King over all the earth.
verses.3: He subdues peoples under us And nations under our feet.
verses.4: He chooses our inheritance for us, The pride of Jacob whom He loves. Selah
verses.5: God has ascended with a shout, The LORD, with the sound of a trumpet.
verses.6: Sing praises to God, sing praises; Sing praises to our King, sing praises.
verses.7: For God is the King of all the earth; Sing praises with a psalm of wisdom.
verses.8: God reigns over the nations, God sits on His holy throne.
verses.9: The princes of the people have assembled as the people of the God of Abraham, For the shields of the earth belong to God; He is highly exalted.
